reason: Video compilation contains no FLS task performance. Content includes: interview/lecture footage of a male speaker in office setting (multiple frames), institutional tour footage (hospital signage, buildings, campus), presentation slide showing 'Errors & Proficiency Time', classroom/lab scenes with students and SimBioNix/LAP Mentor simulator equipment, patient eye chart testing, and institutional branding slides. No actual FLS task execution (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture) is visible. This appears to be institutional educational/promotional video material rather than a trainee or expert FLS performance video.
